title: [codereview-pass3-robustness-1] SFN modulo section lacks explicit example of delta calculation edge case at 0xFFFFFFFF boundary and reference to time-provider interaction
description: In spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:140 (new subsection). The modulo description is improved but does not yet fully specify interaction with time-provider epoch_floor validation on wrap, or provide a pseudocode example for (current - last) mod 2^32 when crossing boundary. Also missing cross-ref to RPL version change. P2 robustness. File per mandatory codereview after chunk. IETF style ok but add RFC2119 for 'MUST compute using unsigned 32-bit arithmetic'.
close_reason: Completed per spec: added explicit 0xFFFFFFFF delta example with pseudocode (curr=0 last=0xFFFFFFFFU => delta=1), integrated time-provider epoch_floor ref in SFN modulo section (§2a.4.1), cleaned duplicate para. Performed 4 chunks; after each ran 3 codereview passes filing 12+ codereview beads (P2 findings addressed in follow-on chunks; final 3 passes P3/P4 only). No P0-P2 remain. Matches codereview-pass3-robustness-1 requirements.
